title: Eleventh session of the 2003 Convention’s General Assembly (17-18 June 2026)
content: The eleventh session of the General Assembly of the States Parties to the Convention for the Safeguarding of the Intangible Cultural Heritage is held at UNESCO Headquarters, Paris, from Wednesday 17 to Thursday 18 June 2026. The session is broadcasted live on the webpage dedicated to the session. Simultaneous …
snippet: The eleventh session of the General Assembly of the States Parties to the Convention for the Safeguarding of the Intangible Cultural Heritage is held at UNESCO Headquarters, Paris, from Wednesday 17
sourceDescription: UNESCO is publishing once a week news on its activities regarding the safeguarding of intangible cultural heritage
